assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS no-ops on missing table
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS alter_if_exists_missing_table ADD PRIMARY KEY (id);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS DROP COLUMN no-ops on missing table
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE IF EXISTS alter_if_exists_missing_drop_column DROP COLUMN id;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS no-ops on missing column
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE drop_missing_column_if_exists_items DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS missing_label;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS no-ops on missing column
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM drop_missing_column_if_exists_items;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS drops the column when it exists
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE drop_existing_column_if_exists_items DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS note;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS drops the column when it exists
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM drop_existing_column_if_exists_items;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS drops the column when it exists
assertions.query: SELECT note FROM drop_existing_column_if_exists_items;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS emits a NOTICE on missing column
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE drop_if_exists_notice_items DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS missing_label;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE applies surviving clauses when DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS targets a missing column
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE drop_if_exists_multi_clause_items
								DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS missing_col,
								DROP COLUMN drop_me,
								ADD COLUMN added_col INT;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE applies surviving clauses when DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS targets a missing column
assertions.query: SELECT id, keep_me, added_col FROM drop_if_exists_multi_clause_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE applies surviving clauses when DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS targets a missing column
assertions.query: SELECT drop_me FROM drop_if_exists_multi_clause_items;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN without IF EXISTS still errors on missing column
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE drop_missing_strict_items DROP COLUMN missing_col;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS folds unquoted identifiers to lowercase
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE drop_if_exists_case_items DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS MixedCaseCol;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS folds unquoted identifiers to lowercase
assertions.query: SELECT id FROM drop_if_exists_case_items;

assertions.scriptName: DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS folds unquoted identifiers to lowercase
assertions.query: SELECT mixedcasecol FROM drop_if_exists_case_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE USING converts existing rows
ALTER COLUMN TYPE rejects row type dependents
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE row_type_parent
						ALTER COLUMN a SET DATA TYPE INT;

assertions.scriptName: SET and DROP NOT NULL allow row type dependents
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE row_type_not_null_parent ALTER COLUMN a SET NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: SET and DROP NOT NULL allow row type dependents
assertions.query: INSERT INTO row_type_not_null_parent VALUES (NULL, 'parent');

assertions.scriptName: SET and DROP NOT NULL allow row type dependents
assertions.query: INSERT INTO row_type_not_null_child VALUES (1, ROW(NULL, 'child'));

assertions.scriptName: SET and DROP NOT NULL allow row type dependents
assertions.query: ALTER TABLE row_type_not_null_parent ALTER COLUMN a DROP NOT NULL;

assertions.scriptName: SET and DROP NOT NULL allow row type dependents
assertions.query: INSERT INTO row_type_not_null_parent VALUES (NULL, 'parent');

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE applies typmods to existing rows
ALTER COLUMN TYPE rejects typmod overflow
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_type_typmod_overflow_items
						ALTER COLUMN amount TYPE NUMERIC(5,2);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE rejects typmod overflow
ALTER COLUMN TYPE varchar rejects existing overflow
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_type_varchar_overflow_items
						ALTER COLUMN label TYPE VARCHAR(3);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE varchar rejects existing overflow
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label, pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM alter_type_varchar_overflow_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE varchar truncates trailing spaces
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label, length(label), pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM alter_type_varchar_trailing_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE character rejects existing overflow
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_type_character_overflow_items
						ALTER COLUMN label TYPE CHARACTER(3);

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE character rejects existing overflow
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label, pg_typeof(label)::text, octet_length(label)
						FROM alter_type_character_overflow_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE character pads existing short values
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label = 'ab '::CHARACTER(3), pg_typeof(label)::text, octet_length(label)
						FROM alter_type_character_padding_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE character truncates trailing spaces
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label = 'abc'::CHARACTER(3), octet_length(label), pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM alter_type_character_trailing_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN TYPE applies timetz typmod to existing rows
ALTER COLUMN TYPE applies time typmod to existing rows
ALTER COLUMN TYPE applies timestamptz typmod to existing rows
ALTER COLUMN TYPE applies interval typmod to existing rows
ALTER TABLE ADD timetz typmod column default backfills rounded value
ALTER TABLE ADD time typmod column default backfills rounded value
ALTER TABLE ADD timestamp typmod column default backfills rounded value
ALTER TABLE ADD timestamptz typmod column default backfills rounded value
ALTER TABLE ADD interval typmod column default backfills restricted value
ALTER TABLE ADD varchar typmod column default truncates trailing spaces
ALTER TABLE ADD character typmod column default truncates trailing spaces
ALTER TABLE ADD character typmod column default pads backfill
ALTER COLUMN SET DEFAULT varchar truncates trailing spaces
assertions.query:
SELECT label, length(label), pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM alter_set_default_varchar_trailing_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER COLUMN SET DEFAULT character truncates trailing spaces
assertions.query:
SELECT label = 'abc'::CHARACTER(3), octet_length(label), pg_typeof(label)::text
						FROM alter_set_default_character_trailing_items;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE reloptions persist in pg_class
ALTER TABLE SET TABLESPACE pg_default
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label
						FROM alter_table_default_tablespace_items;

assertions.scriptName: SET TABLESPACE rejects unknown tablespace
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_table_unknown_tablespace_items
						SET TABLESPACE custom_space;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER TABLE SET ACCESS METHOD heap
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label
						FROM alter_table_access_method_items;

assertions.scriptName: SET ACCESS METHOD rejects non-heap target
assertions.query:
ALTER TABLE alter_table_unknown_access_method_items
						SET ACCESS METHOD btree;
